title: Good Living

body:
**MODS RECOMENDED**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)


## Good Living - Elevate Your Minecraft Experience

A good living style is amazing, but with this resource pack, it's even more amazing. Good Living enhances your Minecraft world with a fresh, vibrant aesthetic that will transform your gameplay experience.

### What Does Good Living Add?
Good Living adds a variety of new textures and visual improvements to your Minecraft game. Each block, item, and environment detail has been meticulously designed to create a more immersive and visually stunning experience.

### Key Features:
- **Enhanced Textures**: Revamped textures for blocks, items, and environments that make your world look more vibrant and lively. These textures are not only detailed but also pleasant to look at, enhancing your overall gaming experience.
- **Improved Visuals**: High-quality visuals that enhance the overall look and feel of Minecraft, making the game more engaging and aesthetically pleasing.
- **Seamless Integration**: Designed to integrate seamlessly with your current Minecraft version, ensuring that you can enjoy the enhanced visuals without compatibility issues.

### Why Download Good Living?
- **Immersive Experience**: Dive into a more engaging and beautiful Minecraft world with textures that add depth and richness to every aspect of the game.
- **Attention to Detail**: Each texture is crafted with care to ensure a cohesive and visually appealing look, making every block and item a work of art.
- **Regular Updates**: Stay up-to-date with the latest changes and improvements as the resource pack is continually refined and expanded.

### Version Information
- **Current Version**: Good Living is available for various Minecraft versions. Ensure you are using the correct version of the resource pack that matches your Minecraft version. For example, if you are running Minecraft 1.18.2, download the corresponding Good Living version designed for 1.18.2 to ensure compatibility and access to all the latest features and textures for that version.

### Beta Information
- **BETA Status**: Good Living is currently in beta, meaning it is not yet complete and may receive updates with new textures and improvements. This also means that user feedback is important to further refine the pack.

### Compatibility Information
- **Minecraft Version Compatibility**: Good Living is available for multiple versions of Minecraft. Make sure to use the specific version of Good Living that matches your Minecraft version. For example, if you are using Minecraft 1.18.2, download the Good Living version specifically made for 1.18.2.
- **Sodium Compatibility**: Some features might not work perfectly with the Sodium mod, but the core textures will still be applied. Sodium is known for enhancing performance, so combining it with Good Living can still provide a visually appealing and smooth experience.
- **OptiFine Not Needed**: With the introduction of the Entity Texture Features (ETF) mod, you no longer need OptiFine to load the textures correctly. ETF is a versatile mod available for both Fabric and Forge, providing similar functionality to OptiFine by allowing custom entity textures and other graphical improvements, making it an excellent alternative for enhancing your visuals.
- **Entity Texture Features (ETF) Mod**: ETF allows you to load the textures without needing OptiFine. ETF is available for both Fabric and Forge, offering similar functionalities to OptiFine and enabling custom entity textures and other graphical improvements.
- **Fabric and Forge Support**: Good Living is compatible with both Fabric and Forge mod loaders. This ensures that you can use this resource pack regardless of which mod loader you prefer, providing flexibility and convenience.

### Additional Notes
- **Performance Considerations**: While Good Living is designed to enhance visuals, it may require more processing power. Ensure your system meets the recommended specifications for an optimal experience.
- **Mod Conflicts**: If you encounter issues, check for conflicts with other installed mods. Ensure that all mods and resource packs are up-to-date.
- **Support**: If the textures do not apply correctly, please contact us on our Discord server for assistance. Our community and support team are available to help resolve any issues you may encounter.

Download Good Living for your specific Minecraft version today and enhance your Minecraft world with a fresh, new look!
